analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$77,000 as of Apr 28 00:15 UTC (range $76,870-$77,875 on Apr 28). Down ~2% from yesterday's $77,900. $80K resistance unbroken — heavy sell wall capping the rally. Support $75,000 (100-day MA).
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 47 (Neutral) — improved from 33 (Fear) yesterday and 29 last week
BTC up +13.71% in April 2026 — best April since 2020
9 consecutive days of positive BTC spot ETF inflows
KelpDAO exploit: $292M stolen, $14B DeFi TVL exodus — altcoins hit harder than BTC
Trump proposal to expand US government BTC holdings — bullish long-term signal
RSI 62.63 (neutral-bullish); 21 bullish vs 11 bearish technical indicators
FOMC Apr 28-29: rate hold near-certain (3.50-3.75%); Powell tone is key risk
Iran peace proposal sent; Hormuz reopening still uncertain
No CPI/PPI releases in next 24h (CPI Apr release: May 12)
analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC Day 2 Apr 29 brings rate decision at 18:00 UTC — hold near-certain but market awaits Powell tone. ETF inflows strongest in months but $80K is a firm resistance. BTC showed resilience vs DeFi exploit impact. F&G recovered to Neutral (47). Confidence kept at 0.45 — macro filter INACTIVE (requires >= 0.50).
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.45): Strong monthly gain (+13.7%) and record ETF inflows are bullish, but FOMC overhang creates pre-event uncertainty. $80K resistance unbroken. KelpDAO exploit rattled DeFi sentiment. Iran geopolitical risk unresolved. Mixed signals = neutral regime, confidence just below threshold.
